memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout, const TTL_offset_t offset, const TTL_dim_t elem_size)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_TENSOR_LOCATIONtensor

briefdescription.para: const and non-const tensor creation functions.

detaileddescription.para:
__TTL_create_tensor_impl
Use of macros to ensure that functions are EXACTLY the same, along for the compiler to remove duplication and potentially a TTL_int_tensor_t to be safely case to a TTL_const_int_tensor_t.
__TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub, _5_params) * *
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor *
offset
The offset of the tensor from the base.
TTL_offset_t *
elem_size
The size of a single element in the * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub, _t)

briefdescription.para: Cast a __TTL_tensor_overloaded_name(_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , ) to a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, * , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * * This is a safe cast, and implimented as a function with helper macro for TTL_TENSOR_TYPE safety * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
tensor
The __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) to be cast to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * *
A __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) version of the input tensor

briefdescription.para: Cast a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) *to a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const_, * TENSOR_LOCATION , void, , _t) * * * Lower level function take a void * tensor, this cast allows any tensor to be easily cast to a void * * * This cast does remove information althought is nominally safe. It should be used sparingly. * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
tensor
The __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) to be cast to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * *
A __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) version of the input tensor

briefdescription.para: A Tensor is empty if its shape is empty.

parameterdescription.para: The tensor to test for emptiness * *

simplesect.para: true is the tensor is empty *
false is the tensor is not empty

briefdescription.para: Create an empty TENSOR_LOCATION tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * * Most operations on an empty tensor should turn into no-ops and so an empty * tensor is the safest default state.
Create an empty TENSOR_LOCATION tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
unused
Simply defined to allow selection of the functon to call. * * As above but a dummy parameter is used to select the version to all

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(const TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout, const TTL_offset_t offset, const TTL_dim_t elem_size)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_const_TENSOR_LOCATIONtensor

briefdescription.para: create TTL_create_int_tensor_impl

listitem.para:
__TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, const , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub, _5_params) * *
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor *
offset
The offset of the tensor from the base.
TTL_offset_t *
elem_size
The size of a single element in the * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub, _t)

briefdescription.para: Cast a __TTL_tensor_overloaded_name(_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , ) to a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, * const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * * This is a safe cast, and implimented as a function with helper macro for TTL_TENSOR_TYPE safety * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
tensor
The __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) to be cast to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * *
A __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) version of the input tensor

briefdescription.para: Cast a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) *to a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const_, * TENSOR_LOCATION , void, , _t) * * * Lower level function take a void * tensor, this cast allows any tensor to be easily cast to a void * * * This cast does remove information althought is nominally safe. It should be used sparingly. * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
tensor
The __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) to be cast to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * *
A __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) version of the input tensor

briefdescription.para: A Tensor is empty if its shape is empty.

parameterdescription.para: The tensor to test for emptiness * *

simplesect.para: true is the tensor is empty *
false is the tensor is not empty

briefdescription.para: Create an empty TENSOR_LOCATION tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * * Most operations on an empty tensor should turn into no-ops and so an empty * tensor is the safest default state.
Create an empty TENSOR_LOCATION tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
unused
Simply defined to allow selection of the functon to call. * * As above but a dummy parameter is used to select the version to all

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout, const TTL_dim_t elem_size)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_TENSOR_LOCATIONtensor

briefdescription.para: create TTL_create_const_int_tensor_impl

listitem.para:
__TTL_tensor_overloaded_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , ) * *
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor *
elem_size
The size of a single element in the tensor * *
The layout of the created tensor will have an offset of (0, 0, 0) * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t)

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_TENSOR_LOCATIONtensor

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_overloaded_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , ) * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
base
A pointer to a global address *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor * *
The layout of the created tensor will have an offset of (0, 0, 0) * The element size is inferred from the base_address pointer TTL_TENSOR_TYPE . * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t)

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_dim_t elem_size)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_TENSOR_LOCATIONtensor

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_overloaded_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , ) * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
base
A pointer to a global address *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points to *
elem_size
The size of a single element in the tensor * *
Layout is inferred from the shape. * Offset is taken to be zero. * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t)

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_overloaded_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , ) * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
base
A pointer to a global address *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points to * *
Element size is inferred from the base_address pointer TTL_TENSOR_TYPE . * Layout is inferred from the shape. * Offset is taken to be zero. * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t)

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(const TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout, const TTL_dim_t elem_size)

memberdef.name: TTL_create_TENSOR_LOCATIONsub_tensor

briefdescription.para: const and non-const sub tensor creation functions.

detaileddescription.para:
__TTL_create_sub_tensor_impl
Use of macros to ensure that functions are EXACTLY the same, along for the compiler to remove duplication and potentially a TTL_int_tensor_t to be safely case to a TTL_const_int_tensor_t.
__TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub, _7_params) * *
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor *
elem_size
The size of a single element in the *
offset
The offset of the tensor from the base.
TTL_offset_t *
origin_shape
The shape of the tensor that originated the sub tensor *
origin_offset
The offset of the tensor from the souce tensor.
TTL_offset_t * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub, _t)

briefdescription.para: Cast a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_, <em>t) *const tensor) to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const_, TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_, _t) * * This is a safe cast, and implimented as a function with helper macro for TTL_TENSOR_TYPE safety * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
tensor
The __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_, <em>t) to be cast to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const, TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_, _t) * *
A __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_, TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_, _t) version of the input tensor

briefdescription.para: Cast a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_, <em>t) *to a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, const_, * TENSOR_LOCATION , void, sub_, _t) * * * Lower level function take a void * tensor, this cast allows any tensor to be easily cast to a void * * * This cast does remove information althought is nominally safe. It should be used sparingly. * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
tensor
The __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , <em>t) to be cast to a * __TTL_tensor_name(TTL, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) * *
A __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , , _t) version of the input tensor

briefdescription.para: A Tensor is empty if its shape is empty.

parameterdescription.para: The tensor to test for emptiness * *

simplesect.para: true is the tensor is empty *
false is the tensor is not empty

briefdescription.para: Create an empty tiled internal tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * * Most operations on an empty tensor should turn into no-ops and so an empty * tensor is the safest default state.
Create an empty TENSOR_LOCATION sub tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
unused
Simply defined to allow selection of the functon to call. * * As above but a dummy parameter is used to select the version to all

briefdescription.para: A Tensor is empty if its shape is empty.

parameterdescription.para: The tensor to test for emptiness * *

simplesect.para: true is the tensor is empty *
false is the tensor is not empty

briefdescription.para: Create an empty tiled internal tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * * Most operations on an empty tensor should turn into no-ops and so an empty * tensor is the safest default state.
Create an empty TENSOR_LOCATION sub tensor. Empty means it has all dimensions set * to zero * *.

detaileddescription.para:
*
unused
Simply defined to allow selection of the functon to call. * * As above but a dummy parameter is used to select the version to all

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout, const TTL_const_ext_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t origin_tensor, const TTL_offset_t sub_offset)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_TENSOR_LOCATIONsub_tensor

briefdescription.para: create TTL_create_int_sub_tensor_impl

listitem.para:
__TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _5_params) * *
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor *
origin_tensor
The tensor that originated the sub_ tensor *
sub_offset
The offset of the tensor from the souce tensor.
TTL_offset_t * *
The element size of the tensor is taken from the origin tensor * The offset of the sub_ tensor is taken to be (0, 0, 0) * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _t)

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _2_params) * * Simply create a sub_tensor from an origin tensor * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
origin_tensor
The tensor that originated the sub_ tensor * *
The element size of the tensor is taken from the origin tensor * The offset of the sub_ tensor is taken to be (0, 0, 0) * The offset of the sub_ tensor relative to the source tensor is taken to be (0, 0, 0) * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _t)

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _1_param) * * Simply create a sub_tensor from an origin tensor * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
origin_tensor
The tensor that originated the sub_ tensor * *
Effective creates a sub_ -tensor that is a tensor covering 100% of the source tensor * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _t)

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(const TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_shape_t shape, const TTL_layout_t layout, const TTL_const_ext_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t origin_tensor, const TTL_offset_t sub_offset)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_const_TENSOR_LOCATIONsub_tensor

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _5_params) * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
shape
Description of the shape of the tensor that base points *
layout
The layout of theTENSOR_LOCATIONtensor *
origin_tensor
The tensor that originated the sub_ tensor *
sub_offset
The offset of the tensor from the souce tensor.
TTL_offset_t * *
The element size of the tensor is taken from the origin tensor * The offset of the sub_ tensor is taken to be (0, 0, 0) * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _t)

memberdef.argsstring: (TENSOR_ADDRESS(const TTL_TENSOR_TYPE *) const base, const TTL_const_ext_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t origin_tensor)
memberdef.name: TTL_create_const_TENSOR_LOCATIONsub_tensor

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _2_params) * * Simply create a sub_tensor from an origin tensor * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
base
TheTENSOR_ADDRESSbase address of the tensor inTENSOR_LOCATIONmemory *
origin_tensor
The tensor that originated the sub_ tensor * *
The element size of the tensor is taken from the origin tensor * The offset of the sub_ tensor is taken to be (0, 0, 0) * The offset of the sub_ tensor relative to the source tensor is taken to be (0, 0, 0) * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _t)

briefdescription.para: __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_create_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _1_param) * * Simply create a sub_tensor from an origin tensor * *

detaileddescription.para:
*
origin_tensor
The tensor that originated the sub_ tensor * *
Effective creates a sub_ -tensor that is a tensor covering 100% of the source tensor * *
return a __TTL_tensor_name(TTL_, const_ , TENSOR_LOCATION , TTL_TENSOR_TYPE , sub_ , _t)
When including this file the follow must be defined
TENSOR_LOCATION ext_ or TENSOR_LOCATION TENSOR_ADDRESS TENSOR_ADDRESS or TTL_global TTL_TENSOR_TYPE void, uchar, uchar2 etc etc.
